---
title: "St. Augustine’s College"
---

## St. Augustine’s College

**Type:** organization

### About

This was a college for missionaries in Canterbury, founded in 1845, which survived until 1967. The Warden 1880-1902 was the Rev. G. M. Maclear. Its buildings are now occupied by the King’s School, Canterbury, and its archive is held by Canterbury Cathedral Archives.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
